critical_incidents.summary: Scheduler stopped after control-plane lease loss
critical_incidents.reason: The local control plane lost leadership and stopped the scheduler so an external supervisor can restart or fail over.

details.operator_message: This instance lost the control-plane lease and stopped its scheduler so another owner or an external supervisor can take over safely.
